title: Spicy Zesty Brazilian Chicken Air-Fry
description: A spicy, creamy, and delicious Brazilian-inspired air-fryer chicken dish, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality oil for best flavor

ingredients.name: oyster sauce
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality sauce for best flavor

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: such as cheddar or Monterey Jack

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality salt for best flavor

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality pepper for best flavor

instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a small bowl and brush it onto both sides of the chicken.
Place the chicken in the air fryer basket and cook for 10 minutes.
Flip the chicken and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, mix together the garlic, cilantro, lime juice, oyster sauce, and hot sauce in a small bowl.
Remove the chicken from the air fryer and brush it with the spicy sauce.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and top it with shredded cheese and a dollop of sour cream.
